history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: Believers, take care of your own souls. The misguided cannot harm you as long as you are guided. All of you will return to God. Then He will make you realize that which you used to do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ لَا يَضُرُّكُم مَّن ضَلَّ إِذَا ٱهْتَدَيْتُمْ ۚ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: And if they would betray you, they betrayed God before, and He gave \[you\] power over them. God is aware and wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِن يُرِيدُوا۟ خِيَانَتَكَ فَقَدْ خَانُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مِن قَبْلُ فَأَمْكَنَ مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: if you have suffered a wound, they too have suffered a similar wound. We bring these days to men by turns, so that God may know those who believe, and choose witnesses from among you; and God does not love the unjust,
matches.ayah_ar: إِن يَمْسَسْكُمْ قَرْحٌۭ فَقَدْ مَسَّ ٱلْقَوْمَ قَرْحٌۭ مِّثْلُهُۥ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَيَّامُ نُدَاوِلُهَا بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَيَتَّخِذَ مِنكُمْ شُهَدَآءَ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: there is good news in this life and in the Hereafter: the Word of God shall never change. That is the supreme triumph.
matches.ayah_ar: لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

matches.ayah: So be patient, for what God has promised is sure to come. Ask forgiveness for your sins; praise your Lord morning and evening.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِبْكَٰرِ

matches.ayah: We hope our Lord will forgive us, as we are the first of the believers."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you \[Prophet\] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,
matches.ayah_ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ رُوحًۭا مِّنْ أَمْرِنَا ۚ مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى مَا ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَلَا ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِن جَعَلْنَٰهُ نُورًۭا نَّهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن نَّشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۚ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ

matches.ayah: Then We set you on a clear path \[of religion\]: so follow it, and do not yield to the desires of those who have no knowledge.
matches.ayah_ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

matches.ayah: Father, I have been given some knowledge which has not come to you, so follow me: I shall guide you along a straight path.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًۭا سَوِيًّۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: those who believe and whose hearts find comfort in the remembrance of God -- surely in the remembrance of God hearts can find comfort.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ

matches.ayah: whose hearts are filled with awe at the mention of God; who endure adversity with fortitude, say their prayers regularly and spend out of what We have given them.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَهُمْ وَٱلْمُقِيمِى ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ

matches.ayah: There is truly a reminder in this for whoever has a heart, whoever listens attentively.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: The believer said, "My people, follow me! I will guide you to the right path.
matches.ayah_ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَامَنَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّشَادِ

matches.ayah: Men, you have received clear evidence from your Lord. We have sent down a clear light to you.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ قَدْ جَآءَكُم بُرْهَٰنٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ نُورًۭا مُّبِينًۭا

matches.ayah: Your Lord knows best who has strayed from His Way and He knows best those who are guided.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ مَن يَضِلُّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۖ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: We have sent you forth as a mercy to all mankind.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: He who submits himself completely to God, and is a doer of good, has surely grasped a strong handle, for the final outcome of all events rests with God.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ وَمَن يُسْلِمْ وَجْهَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌۭ فَقَدِ ٱسْتَمْسَكَ بِٱلْعُرْوَةِ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ ۗ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: Stay well away from an orphan's property, except with the best intentions, before he comes of age. Give full measure and weight, according to justice, We never charge a soul with more than it can bear, when you speak, observe justice, even though it concerns a close relative; and fulfil the covenants of God. That is what He has enjoined upon you so that you may take heed.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ مَالَ ٱلْيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبْلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ ۖ وَأَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَإِذَا قُلْتُمْ فَٱعْدِلُوا۟ وَلَوْ كَانَ ذَا قُرْبَىٰ ۖ وَبِعَهْدِ ٱللَّهِ أَوْفُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: We never sent any messengers before you who did not eat food and walk in the market-place. We make some of you a means of trial for others, to see whether you are steadfast. Your Lord is all seeing.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍۢ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًۭا

matches.ayah: Who responds to the oppressed when he calls out to Him, and relieves his suffering and who will make you inheritors of the earth? Then, is there a god besides God? How little you pay heed!
matches.ayah_ar: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: God! There is no deity save Him, the Living, the Sustainer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَىُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: Whatever blessing you have is from God, and to Him you turn for help when distress befalls you,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍۢ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ

matches.ayah: So remember Me; I will remember you. Be thankful to Me and do not be ungrateful.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱذْكُرُونِىٓ أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَٱشْكُرُوا۟ لِى وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ

matches.ayah: Therefore, you should worship God alone and be among the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I have been crying all day and feel so empty inside like nothing matters anymore

matches.ayah: Pray to your Lord and sacrifice to Him alone.
matches.ayah_ar: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ

matches.ayah: We do indeed know how your heart is distressed at what they say.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ

matches.ayah: When the Quran is read, listen to it with attention, and hold your peace, so that you may receive mercy.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ فَٱسْتَمِعُوا۟ لَهُۥ وَأَنصِتُوا۟ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: As for those who left their homes for the cause of God and then were slain or died, God will give them a generous provision. Surely God is the Best of Providers.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ قُتِلُوٓا۟ أَوْ مَاتُوا۟ لَيَرْزُقَنَّهُمُ ٱللَّهُ رِزْقًا حَسَنًۭا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ

matches.ayah: Our provision for you will never be exhausted.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ

matches.ayah: You will surely be tried and tested in your possessions and your persons, and you shall surely hear many hurtful things from those who were given the Book before you and from those who set up partners with God, but if you endure with fortitude and restrain yourselves, that indeed is a matter of strong determination.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ لَتُبْلَوُنَّ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ وَلَتَسْمَعُنَّ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوٓا۟ أَذًۭى كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَإِن تَصْبِرُوا۟ وَتَتَّقُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: It is God who has given you the night in which to rest and the day in which to see. God is truly bountiful to people, but most people do not give thanks.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِتَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

matches.ayah: I am conveying my Lord's messages to you and giving you sincere advice. I know things from God that you do not.
matches.ayah_ar: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

matches.ayah: We gave him blessings in this world, and in the Hereafter he shall be among the righteous.
matches.ayah_ar: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةًۭ ۖ وَإِنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: God knows all that you conceal and all that you reveal.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ

matches.ayah: your Lord has not forsaken you, nor is He displeased with you,
matches.ayah_ar: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ

matches.ayah: You were heedless of this, but now We have removed your veil, so your sight today is sharp.
matches.ayah_ar: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: My people, seek forgiveness of your Lord and turn to Him in repentance. He will send from the sky abundant rain upon you; He will add strength to your strength. Do not turn away from Him as evil-doers."
matches.ayah_ar: وَيَٰقَوْمِ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًۭا وَيَزِدْكُمْ قُوَّةً إِلَىٰ قُوَّتِكُمْ وَلَا تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ

matches.ayah: Ask God for forgiveness: He is most forgiving and merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَغْفِرِ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًۭا رَّحِيمًۭا

matches.ayah: and do not invoke besides God what can neither help nor harm you. If you do, you will be one of the wrongdoers.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَدْعُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكَ وَلَا يَضُرُّكَ ۖ فَإِن فَعَلْتَ فَإِنَّكَ إِذًۭا مِّنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: stand up to pray for much of the night.
matches.ayah_ar: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا

matches.ayah: God had already helped you at Badr, when you were weak. Fear God, so that you may be grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَصَرَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِبَدْرٍۢ وَأَنتُمْ أَذِلَّةٌۭ ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ

matches.ayah: Believers, do not approach your prayers when you are drunk, until you understand what you say, nor when you are in a state of impurity, -- except when you are on a journey -- till you have bathed. And if you are ill, or on a journey or have relieved yourselves or when you have consorted with women and you cannot find any water, then find some clean sand and wipe your face and your hands with it. God is gracious and forgiving.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنتُمْ سُكَٰرَىٰ حَتَّىٰ تَعْلَمُوا۟ مَا تَقُولُونَ وَلَا جُنُبًا إِلَّا عَابِرِى سَبِيلٍ حَتَّىٰ تَغْتَسِلُوا۟ ۚ وَإِن كُنتُم مَّرْضَىٰٓ أَوْ عَلَىٰ سَفَرٍ أَوْ جَآءَ أَحَدٌۭ مِّنكُم مِّنَ ٱلْغَآئِطِ أَوْ لَٰمَسْتُمُ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا۟ مَآءًۭ فَتَيَمَّمُوا۟ صَعِيدًۭا طَيِّبًۭا فَٱمْسَحُوا۟ بِوُجُوهِكُمْ وَأَيْدِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَفُوًّا غَفُورًا

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: it is He who gave you life. Then He will cause you to die. Then He will give you life again. Surely, man is most ungrateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحْيَاكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَكَفُورٌۭ

matches.ayah: When two groups from among you were about to lose heart, God was their protector. In God let the faithful put their trust.
matches.ayah_ar: إِذْ هَمَّت طَّآئِفَتَانِ مِنكُمْ أَن تَفْشَلَا وَٱللَّهُ وَلِيُّهُمَا ۗ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

matches.ayah: It may well be that God will create goodwill between you and those of them with whom you are now at enmity -- for God is all powerful, most forgiving and merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةًۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: O my dear son! Say your prayers regularly, and enjoin good, and forbid evil, and endure patiently whatever may befall you. Surely, this is something which requires firm resolve.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰبُنَىَّ أَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأْمُرْ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ وَٱنْهَ عَنِ ٱلْمُنكَرِ وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَكَ ۖ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: and the Hereafter will indeed be better for you than the present life;
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَلْءَاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ

matches.ayah: Never think that God will fail in His promise to His messengers. God is mighty and capable of retribution.
matches.ayah_ar: فَلَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِفَ وَعْدِهِۦ رُسُلَهُۥٓ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌۭ ذُو ٱنتِقَامٍۢ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: God is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is the straight path."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۗ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ

matches.ayah: You cannot guide whoever you please: it is God who guides whom He will. He best knows those who would accept guidance.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِى مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

matches.ayah: but whoever has been blind in this life will be blind in the life to come, and still farther astray from the path \[of truth\].
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَن كَانَ فِى هَٰذِهِۦٓ أَعْمَىٰ فَهُوَ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَعْمَىٰ وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: God brought you forth from the wombs of your mothers while you knew nothing, and gave you hearing and sight and hearts, so that you might be grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَخْرَجَكُم مِّنۢ بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ شَيْـًۭٔا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۙ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ

matches.ayah: Keep yourself attached to those who call on their Lord, morning and evening, seeking His pleasure; and do not let your eyes turn away from them, desiring the attraction of worldly life; and do not obey one whose heart We have made heedless of Our remembrance, one who pursues his own whims and becomes dissolute.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱصْبِرْ نَفْسَكَ مَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَدَوٰةِ وَٱلْعَشِىِّ يُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَهُۥ ۖ وَلَا تَعْدُ عَيْنَاكَ عَنْهُمْ تُرِيدُ زِينَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَا تُطِعْ مَنْ أَغْفَلْنَا قَلْبَهُۥ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ وَكَانَ أَمْرُهُۥ فُرُطًۭا

matches.ayah: but whose hearts are not in their prayer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: God said, "This is the path which leads straight to Me.
matches.ayah_ar: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ

matches.ayah: Say, "Anyone who is an enemy of Gabriel, who by God's leave has brought down to your heart \[the Quran\] fulfilling that \[predictions about the last prophet in the earlier revelations\] which precedes it, and is a guidance and good news for the faithful,
matches.ayah_ar: قُلْ مَن كَانَ عَدُوًّۭا لِّجِبْرِيلَ فَإِنَّهُۥ نَزَّلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَهُدًۭى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

matches.ayah: Proclaim what has been revealed to you from your Lord's Book. None can change His words. You shall find no refuge besides Him.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱتْلُ مَآ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ مِن كِتَابِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَا مُبَدِّلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِهِۦ وَلَن تَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: There has come to you a Messenger of your own. Your suffering distresses him: he is deeply concerned for your welfare and full of kindness and mercy towards the believers.
matches.ayah_ar: لَقَدْ جَآءَكُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ عَزِيزٌ عَلَيْهِ مَا عَنِتُّمْ حَرِيصٌ عَلَيْكُم بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: God asked him, "What is the matter with you, that you are not among those who have prostrated themselves?"
matches.ayah_ar: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ

matches.ayah: or to one who places obstacles in the way of good being done or to the wicked transgressor,
matches.ayah_ar: مَّنَّاعٍۢ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

matches.ayah: Creating and resurrecting all of you is just like creating and resurrecting a single soul. Truly, God hears all and observes all.
matches.ayah_ar: مَّا خَلْقُكُمْ وَلَا بَعْثُكُمْ إِلَّا كَنَفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

matches.ayah: If God were to take people to task for their wrongdoing, He would not leave even one living creature on earth, but He gives them respite till an appointed time: when their time comes they cannot delay it for an hour, nor can they bring it forward.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِظُلْمِهِم مَّا تَرَكَ عَلَيْهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ سَاعَةًۭ ۖ وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ

matches.ayah: Invoke no god other than God, for there is no god but Him. All things are bound to perish except Himself. His is the judgement, and to Him you shall be returned.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۘ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلَّا وَجْهَهُۥ ۚ لَهُ ٱلْحُكْمُ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: and We are nearer to him than you, although you cannot see Us --
matches.ayah_ar: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

matches.ayah: you could not hide yourselves from your ears and your eyes and your skins to prevent them from testifying against you, and you thought that God would never know much of what you did,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ أَن يَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكُمْ سَمْعُكُمْ وَلَآ أَبْصَٰرُكُمْ وَلَا جُلُودُكُمْ وَلَٰكِن ظَنَنتُمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًۭا مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: surely your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I have been crying all day and feel so empty inside like nothing matters anymore

matches.ayah: as a mercy from your Lord, He hears all and knows all,
matches.ayah_ar: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

matches.ayah: But for the grace of God and His mercy upon you, and were not God compassionate and merciful, \[you would have come to grief\].
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

matches.ayah: "Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us. Bestow upon us Your mercy. Surely You are a Munificent Giver.
matches.ayah_ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: God does not charge a soul with more than it can bear. It shall be requited for whatever good and whatever evil it has done. \[They pray\], "Our Lord, do not take us to task if we forget or make a mistake! Our Lord, do not place on us a burden like the one You placed on those before us! Our Lord, do not place on us a burden we have not the strength to bear! Pardon us; and forgive us; and have mercy on us. You are our Lord and Sustainer, so help us against those who deny the truth."
matches.ayah_ar: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا ٱكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَآ إِصْرًۭا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِۦ ۖ وَٱعْفُ عَنَّا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَآ ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَىٰنَا فَٱنصُرْنَا عَلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ

matches.ayah: Remember Ishmael and Idris and Dhul Kifl: they were all patient and steadfast.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ كُلٌّۭ مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

matches.ayah: Call upon those whom you set up beside God! They possess not an atom's weight either in the heavens or on the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor has He any helpers among them.
matches.ayah_ar: قُلِ ٱدْعُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ زَعَمْتُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا لَهُمْ فِيهِمَا مِن شِرْكٍۢ وَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْهُم مِّن ظَهِيرٍۢ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: as a blessing from Us: this is how We reward the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ

matches.ayah: He has made me blessed wherever I may be, and has enjoined upon me prayer and almsgiving throughout my life.
matches.ayah_ar: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّۭا

matches.ayah: Truly, your Lord is bountiful to mankind, but most of them are not grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: God surely knows what you say openly and also knows what you conceal.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ

matches.ayah: All that is evil in the sight of your Lord, and is detestable.
matches.ayah_ar: كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ كَانَ سَيِّئُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّكَ مَكْرُوهًۭا

matches.ayah: Surely, the people who are closest to Abraham are those who followed him and this Prophet \[Muhammad\], and those who believe in him. God is the guardian of the believers.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ أَوْلَى ٱلنَّاسِ بِإِبْرَٰهِيمَ لَلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ وَهَٰذَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ وَلِىُّ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: Seek help with patience and prayer; this is indeed an exacting discipline, but not to the humble,
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱلْخَٰشِعِينَ

matches.ayah: Believers, be steadfast in the cause of God and bear witness with justice. Do not let your enmity for others turn you away from justice. Deal justly; that is nearer to being God-fearing. Fear God. God is aware of all that you do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوا۟ قَوَّٰمِينَ لِلَّهِ شُهَدَآءَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَلَا يَجْرِمَنَّكُمْ شَنَـَٔانُ قَوْمٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَلَّا تَعْدِلُوا۟ ۚ ٱعْدِلُوا۟ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: Obey God and His Messenger, and avoid dissension, lest you falter and are no longer held in awe. Have patience: God is with those who are patient.
matches.ayah_ar: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَا تَنَٰزَعُوا۟ فَتَفْشَلُوا۟ وَتَذْهَبَ رِيحُكُمْ ۖ وَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: God only did this to give you good news, and so that your hearts might be set at rest, for help comes from God alone. Surely, God is Mighty and Wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بُشْرَىٰ وَلِتَطْمَئِنَّ بِهِۦ قُلُوبُكُمْ ۚ وَمَا ٱلنَّصْرُ إِلَّا مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: God wishes to lighten your burdens, for, man has been created weak.
matches.ayah_ar: يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ أَن يُخَفِّفَ عَنكُمْ ۚ وَخُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ ضَعِيفًۭا

matches.ayah: Lord, grant that I may keep up the prayer, and so may my offspring. My Lord, accept my prayer.
matches.ayah_ar: رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْنِى مُقِيمَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَآءِ

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: Believers, take care of your own souls. The misguided cannot harm you as long as you are guided. All of you will return to God. Then He will make you realize that which you used to do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ لَا يَضُرُّكُم مَّن ضَلَّ إِذَا ٱهْتَدَيْتُمْ ۚ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: And if they would betray you, they betrayed God before, and He gave \[you\] power over them. God is aware and wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِن يُرِيدُوا۟ خِيَانَتَكَ فَقَدْ خَانُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مِن قَبْلُ فَأَمْكَنَ مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: if you have suffered a wound, they too have suffered a similar wound. We bring these days to men by turns, so that God may know those who believe, and choose witnesses from among you; and God does not love the unjust,
matches.ayah_ar: إِن يَمْسَسْكُمْ قَرْحٌۭ فَقَدْ مَسَّ ٱلْقَوْمَ قَرْحٌۭ مِّثْلُهُۥ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَيَّامُ نُدَاوِلُهَا بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَيَتَّخِذَ مِنكُمْ شُهَدَآءَ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: there is good news in this life and in the Hereafter: the Word of God shall never change. That is the supreme triumph.
matches.ayah_ar: لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

matches.ayah: So be patient, for what God has promised is sure to come. Ask forgiveness for your sins; praise your Lord morning and evening.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِبْكَٰرِ

matches.ayah: We hope our Lord will forgive us, as we are the first of the believers."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you \[Prophet\] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,
matches.ayah_ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ رُوحًۭا مِّنْ أَمْرِنَا ۚ مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى مَا ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَلَا ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِن جَعَلْنَٰهُ نُورًۭا نَّهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن نَّشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۚ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ

matches.ayah: Then We set you on a clear path \[of religion\]: so follow it, and do not yield to the desires of those who have no knowledge.
matches.ayah_ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

matches.ayah: Father, I have been given some knowledge which has not come to you, so follow me: I shall guide you along a straight path.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًۭا سَوِيًّۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: those who believe and whose hearts find comfort in the remembrance of God -- surely in the remembrance of God hearts can find comfort.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ

matches.ayah: whose hearts are filled with awe at the mention of God; who endure adversity with fortitude, say their prayers regularly and spend out of what We have given them.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَهُمْ وَٱلْمُقِيمِى ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ

matches.ayah: There is truly a reminder in this for whoever has a heart, whoever listens attentively.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: The believer said, "My people, follow me! I will guide you to the right path.
matches.ayah_ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَامَنَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّشَادِ

matches.ayah: Men, you have received clear evidence from your Lord. We have sent down a clear light to you.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ قَدْ جَآءَكُم بُرْهَٰنٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ نُورًۭا مُّبِينًۭا

matches.ayah: Your Lord knows best who has strayed from His Way and He knows best those who are guided.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ مَن يَضِلُّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۖ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: When the Quran is read, listen to it with attention, and hold your peace, so that you may receive mercy.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ فَٱسْتَمِعُوا۟ لَهُۥ وَأَنصِتُوا۟ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: As for those who left their homes for the cause of God and then were slain or died, God will give them a generous provision. Surely God is the Best of Providers.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ قُتِلُوٓا۟ أَوْ مَاتُوا۟ لَيَرْزُقَنَّهُمُ ٱللَّهُ رِزْقًا حَسَنًۭا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ

matches.ayah: He who submits himself completely to God, and is a doer of good, has surely grasped a strong handle, for the final outcome of all events rests with God.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ وَمَن يُسْلِمْ وَجْهَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌۭ فَقَدِ ٱسْتَمْسَكَ بِٱلْعُرْوَةِ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ ۗ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: Our provision for you will never be exhausted.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ

matches.ayah: Stay well away from an orphan's property, except with the best intentions, before he comes of age. Give full measure and weight, according to justice, We never charge a soul with more than it can bear, when you speak, observe justice, even though it concerns a close relative; and fulfil the covenants of God. That is what He has enjoined upon you so that you may take heed.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ مَالَ ٱلْيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبْلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ ۖ وَأَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَإِذَا قُلْتُمْ فَٱعْدِلُوا۟ وَلَوْ كَانَ ذَا قُرْبَىٰ ۖ وَبِعَهْدِ ٱللَّهِ أَوْفُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: We never sent any messengers before you who did not eat food and walk in the market-place. We make some of you a means of trial for others, to see whether you are steadfast. Your Lord is all seeing.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍۢ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًۭا

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: My people, seek forgiveness of your Lord and turn to Him in repentance. He will send from the sky abundant rain upon you; He will add strength to your strength. Do not turn away from Him as evil-doers."
matches.ayah_ar: وَيَٰقَوْمِ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًۭا وَيَزِدْكُمْ قُوَّةً إِلَىٰ قُوَّتِكُمْ وَلَا تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ

matches.ayah: Ask God for forgiveness: He is most forgiving and merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَغْفِرِ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًۭا رَّحِيمًۭا

matches.ayah: Stay in your homes and do not flaunt your charms as in the former times of ignorance. Attend to your prayers, pay the zakat and obey God and His Messenger. Women of the \[Prophet"s\] Household, God seeks only to remove all impurity from you, and to make you completely pure.
matches.ayah_ar: وَقَرْنَ فِى بُيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجْنَ تَبَرُّجَ ٱلْجَٰهِلِيَّةِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَأَقِمْنَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتِينَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِعْنَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّمَا يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنكُمُ ٱلرِّجْسَ أَهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ وَيُطَهِّرَكُمْ تَطْهِيرًۭا

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I have been crying all day and feel so empty inside like nothing matters anymore

matches.ayah: We do indeed know how your heart is distressed at what they say.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ

matches.ayah: We have sent you forth as a mercy to all mankind.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

matches.ayah: Take alms out of their wealth to cleanse them and purify them, and pray for them; your prayer will be a comfort to them. God is all hearing, all knowing.
matches.ayah_ar: خُذْ مِنْ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ صَدَقَةًۭ تُطَهِّرُهُمْ وَتُزَكِّيهِم بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّ صَلَوٰتَكَ سَكَنٌۭ لَّهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: You will surely be tried and tested in your possessions and your persons, and you shall surely hear many hurtful things from those who were given the Book before you and from those who set up partners with God, but if you endure with fortitude and restrain yourselves, that indeed is a matter of strong determination.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ لَتُبْلَوُنَّ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ وَلَتَسْمَعُنَّ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوٓا۟ أَذًۭى كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَإِن تَصْبِرُوا۟ وَتَتَّقُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: God! There is no deity save Him, the Living, the Sustainer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَىُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ

matches.ayah: God does not disdain to give a parable about a gnat or a smaller creature. The faithful know that it is the truth from their Lord, but those who deny the truth ask, "What could God mean by this parable?" He lets many go astray through it, and guides many by it. But He makes only the disobedient go astray:
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًۭا مَّا بَعُوضَةًۭ فَمَا فَوْقَهَا ۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًۭا ۘ يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: Whatever blessing you have is from God, and to Him you turn for help when distress befalls you,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍۢ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ

matches.ayah: Therefore, you should worship God alone and be among the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ

matches.ayah: It is God who has given you the night in which to rest and the day in which to see. God is truly bountiful to people, but most people do not give thanks.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِتَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: God knows all that you conceal and all that you reveal.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ

matches.ayah: your Lord has not forsaken you, nor is He displeased with you,
matches.ayah_ar: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ

matches.ayah: You were heedless of this, but now We have removed your veil, so your sight today is sharp.
matches.ayah_ar: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: Seek forgiveness of your Lord and turn to Him in repentance. For my Lord is indeed merciful and loving."
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ثُمَّ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى رَحِيمٌۭ وَدُودٌۭ

matches.ayah: Anyone who thinks that God will not help him \[His messenger\] in this world and the Hereafter, let him stretch a rope up to the sky; then let him cut it off and see if his plan can help to remove the cause of his anger.
matches.ayah_ar: مَن كَانَ يَظُنُّ أَن لَّن يَنصُرَهُ ٱللَّهُ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْءَاخِرَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ بِسَبَبٍ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ ثُمَّ لْيَقْطَعْ فَلْيَنظُرْ هَلْ يُذْهِبَنَّ كَيْدُهُۥ مَا يَغِيظُ

matches.ayah: Attend to your prayers and pay the zakat and obey the Messenger, so that you may be shown mercy.
matches.ayah_ar: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: stand up to pray for much of the night.
matches.ayah_ar: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا

matches.ayah: God had already helped you at Badr, when you were weak. Fear God, so that you may be grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَصَرَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِبَدْرٍۢ وَأَنتُمْ أَذِلَّةٌۭ ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ

matches.ayah: Believers, do not approach your prayers when you are drunk, until you understand what you say, nor when you are in a state of impurity, -- except when you are on a journey -- till you have bathed. And if you are ill, or on a journey or have relieved yourselves or when you have consorted with women and you cannot find any water, then find some clean sand and wipe your face and your hands with it. God is gracious and forgiving.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنتُمْ سُكَٰرَىٰ حَتَّىٰ تَعْلَمُوا۟ مَا تَقُولُونَ وَلَا جُنُبًا إِلَّا عَابِرِى سَبِيلٍ حَتَّىٰ تَغْتَسِلُوا۟ ۚ وَإِن كُنتُم مَّرْضَىٰٓ أَوْ عَلَىٰ سَفَرٍ أَوْ جَآءَ أَحَدٌۭ مِّنكُم مِّنَ ٱلْغَآئِطِ أَوْ لَٰمَسْتُمُ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فَلَمْ تَجِدُوا۟ مَآءًۭ فَتَيَمَّمُوا۟ صَعِيدًۭا طَيِّبًۭا فَٱمْسَحُوا۟ بِوُجُوهِكُمْ وَأَيْدِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَفُوًّا غَفُورًا

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: it is He who gave you life. Then He will cause you to die. Then He will give you life again. Surely, man is most ungrateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحْيَاكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَكَفُورٌۭ

matches.ayah: When two groups from among you were about to lose heart, God was their protector. In God let the faithful put their trust.
matches.ayah_ar: إِذْ هَمَّت طَّآئِفَتَانِ مِنكُمْ أَن تَفْشَلَا وَٱللَّهُ وَلِيُّهُمَا ۗ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

matches.ayah: It may well be that God will create goodwill between you and those of them with whom you are now at enmity -- for God is all powerful, most forgiving and merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةًۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: O my dear son! Say your prayers regularly, and enjoin good, and forbid evil, and endure patiently whatever may befall you. Surely, this is something which requires firm resolve.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰبُنَىَّ أَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأْمُرْ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ وَٱنْهَ عَنِ ٱلْمُنكَرِ وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَكَ ۖ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: and the Hereafter will indeed be better for you than the present life;
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَلْءَاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ

matches.ayah: My advice will not benefit you, no matter how sincerely I want to advise you, if God lets you go astray. He is your Lord and you will all return to Him."
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا يَنفَعُكُمْ نُصْحِىٓ إِنْ أَرَدتُّ أَنْ أَنصَحَ لَكُمْ إِن كَانَ ٱللَّهُ يُرِيدُ أَن يُغْوِيَكُمْ ۚ هُوَ رَبُّكُمْ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: God is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is the straight path."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۗ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ

matches.ayah: You cannot guide whoever you please: it is God who guides whom He will. He best knows those who would accept guidance.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِى مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

matches.ayah: Say, "Instead of God, shall we call upon that which can neither benefit us nor harm us? Are we to turn upon our heels after God has guided us, like one who, beguiled by devils in the land, wanders bewildered, his companions calling him to the right path, saying, "Come to us"?" Say, "God's guidance is the only guidance. We are commanded to surrender ourselves to the Lord of the Universe,
matches.ayah_ar: قُلْ أَنَدْعُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُنَا وَلَا يَضُرُّنَا وَنُرَدُّ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْقَابِنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَىٰنَا ٱللَّهُ كَٱلَّذِى ٱسْتَهْوَتْهُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ حَيْرَانَ لَهُۥٓ أَصْحَٰبٌۭ يَدْعُونَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱلْهُدَى ٱئْتِنَا ۗ قُلْ إِنَّ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ هُوَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ ۖ وَأُمِرْنَا لِنُسْلِمَ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: God brought you forth from the wombs of your mothers while you knew nothing, and gave you hearing and sight and hearts, so that you might be grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَخْرَجَكُم مِّنۢ بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ شَيْـًۭٔا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۙ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ

matches.ayah: Keep yourself attached to those who call on their Lord, morning and evening, seeking His pleasure; and do not let your eyes turn away from them, desiring the attraction of worldly life; and do not obey one whose heart We have made heedless of Our remembrance, one who pursues his own whims and becomes dissolute.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱصْبِرْ نَفْسَكَ مَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَدَوٰةِ وَٱلْعَشِىِّ يُرِيدُونَ وَجْهَهُۥ ۖ وَلَا تَعْدُ عَيْنَاكَ عَنْهُمْ تُرِيدُ زِينَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَا تُطِعْ مَنْ أَغْفَلْنَا قَلْبَهُۥ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ وَكَانَ أَمْرُهُۥ فُرُطًۭا

matches.ayah: but whose hearts are not in their prayer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: God said, "This is the path which leads straight to Me.
matches.ayah_ar: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ

matches.ayah: Say, "Anyone who is an enemy of Gabriel, who by God's leave has brought down to your heart \[the Quran\] fulfilling that \[predictions about the last prophet in the earlier revelations\] which precedes it, and is a guidance and good news for the faithful,
matches.ayah_ar: قُلْ مَن كَانَ عَدُوًّۭا لِّجِبْرِيلَ فَإِنَّهُۥ نَزَّلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَهُدًۭى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

matches.ayah: Proclaim what has been revealed to you from your Lord's Book. None can change His words. You shall find no refuge besides Him.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱتْلُ مَآ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ مِن كِتَابِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَا مُبَدِّلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِهِۦ وَلَن تَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: There has come to you a Messenger of your own. Your suffering distresses him: he is deeply concerned for your welfare and full of kindness and mercy towards the believers.
matches.ayah_ar: لَقَدْ جَآءَكُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ عَزِيزٌ عَلَيْهِ مَا عَنِتُّمْ حَرِيصٌ عَلَيْكُم بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: Creating and resurrecting all of you is just like creating and resurrecting a single soul. Truly, God hears all and observes all.
matches.ayah_ar: مَّا خَلْقُكُمْ وَلَا بَعْثُكُمْ إِلَّا كَنَفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

matches.ayah: Who responds to the oppressed when he calls out to Him, and relieves his suffering and who will make you inheritors of the earth? Then, is there a god besides God? How little you pay heed!
matches.ayah_ar: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَٰهٌۭ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: or to one who places obstacles in the way of good being done or to the wicked transgressor,
matches.ayah_ar: مَّنَّاعٍۢ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

matches.ayah: He does not forbid you to deal kindly and justly with anyone who has not fought you on account of your faith or driven you out of your homes: God loves the just.
matches.ayah_ar: لَّا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَٰتِلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ

matches.ayah: God is the Creator of all things, He has charge of everything;
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ خَٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَكِيلٌۭ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: God only did this to give you good news, and so that your hearts might be set at rest, for help comes from God alone. Surely, God is Mighty and Wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بُشْرَىٰ وَلِتَطْمَئِنَّ بِهِۦ قُلُوبُكُمْ ۚ وَمَا ٱلنَّصْرُ إِلَّا مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: God wishes to lighten your burdens, for, man has been created weak.
matches.ayah_ar: يُرِيدُ ٱللَّهُ أَن يُخَفِّفَ عَنكُمْ ۚ وَخُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ ضَعِيفًۭا

matches.ayah: Lord, grant that I may keep up the prayer, and so may my offspring. My Lord, accept my prayer.
matches.ayah_ar: رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْنِى مُقِيمَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۚ رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَآءِ

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: I have been crying all day and feel so empty inside like nothing matters anymore

matches.ayah: as a mercy from your Lord, He hears all and knows all,
matches.ayah_ar: رَحْمَةًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

matches.ayah: But for the grace of God and His mercy upon you, and were not God compassionate and merciful, \[you would have come to grief\].
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

matches.ayah: "Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us. Bestow upon us Your mercy. Surely You are a Munificent Giver.
matches.ayah_ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: God does not charge a soul with more than it can bear. It shall be requited for whatever good and whatever evil it has done. \[They pray\], "Our Lord, do not take us to task if we forget or make a mistake! Our Lord, do not place on us a burden like the one You placed on those before us! Our Lord, do not place on us a burden we have not the strength to bear! Pardon us; and forgive us; and have mercy on us. You are our Lord and Sustainer, so help us against those who deny the truth."
matches.ayah_ar: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَعَلَيْهَا مَا ٱكْتَسَبَتْ ۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَآ إِصْرًۭا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِۦ ۖ وَٱعْفُ عَنَّا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَٱرْحَمْنَآ ۚ أَنتَ مَوْلَىٰنَا فَٱنصُرْنَا عَلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ

matches.ayah: Remember Ishmael and Idris and Dhul Kifl: they were all patient and steadfast.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ كُلٌّۭ مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

matches.ayah: Call upon those whom you set up beside God! They possess not an atom's weight either in the heavens or on the earth, nor have they any share in either, nor has He any helpers among them.
matches.ayah_ar: قُلِ ٱدْعُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ زَعَمْتُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا لَهُمْ فِيهِمَا مِن شِرْكٍۢ وَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْهُم مِّن ظَهِيرٍۢ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: as a blessing from Us: this is how We reward the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ

matches.ayah: He has made me blessed wherever I may be, and has enjoined upon me prayer and almsgiving throughout my life.
matches.ayah_ar: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّۭا

matches.ayah: Truly, your Lord is bountiful to mankind, but most of them are not grateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: and We are nearer to him than you, although you cannot see Us --
matches.ayah_ar: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

matches.ayah: you could not hide yourselves from your ears and your eyes and your skins to prevent them from testifying against you, and you thought that God would never know much of what you did,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ أَن يَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكُمْ سَمْعُكُمْ وَلَآ أَبْصَٰرُكُمْ وَلَا جُلُودُكُمْ وَلَٰكِن ظَنَنتُمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًۭا مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: surely your Lord is the Mighty One, the Merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: Seek help with patience and prayer; this is indeed an exacting discipline, but not to the humble,
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱلْخَٰشِعِينَ

matches.ayah: Believers, be steadfast in the cause of God and bear witness with justice. Do not let your enmity for others turn you away from justice. Deal justly; that is nearer to being God-fearing. Fear God. God is aware of all that you do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوا۟ قَوَّٰمِينَ لِلَّهِ شُهَدَآءَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَلَا يَجْرِمَنَّكُمْ شَنَـَٔانُ قَوْمٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَلَّا تَعْدِلُوا۟ ۚ ٱعْدِلُوا۟ هُوَ أَقْرَبُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: Obey God and His Messenger, and avoid dissension, lest you falter and are no longer held in awe. Have patience: God is with those who are patient.
matches.ayah_ar: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَا تَنَٰزَعُوا۟ فَتَفْشَلُوا۟ وَتَذْهَبَ رِيحُكُمْ ۖ وَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

history.comfort: Your anger makes sense. أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ — seek refuge in Allah. He is Just; He sees everything. 🌿

history.entry: I'm exhausted completely drained I have nothing left to give I can't go on like this anymore

matches.ayah: You alone we worship, and to You alone we turn for help.
matches.ayah_ar: إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ

matches.ayah: God has now lightened your burden, for He knows that there is weakness in you. If there are a hundred of you who are steadfast, they will overcome two hundred; and if there are a thousand of you, they will overcome two thousand by God's will. God is with the steadfast.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلْـَٰٔنَ خَفَّفَ ٱللَّهُ عَنكُمْ وَعَلِمَ أَنَّ فِيكُمْ ضَعْفًۭا ۚ فَإِن يَكُن مِّنكُم مِّا۟ئَةٌۭ صَابِرَةٌۭ يَغْلِبُوا۟ مِا۟ئَتَيْنِ ۚ وَإِن يَكُن مِّنكُمْ أَلْفٌۭ يَغْلِبُوٓا۟ أَلْفَيْنِ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ مَعَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

matches.ayah: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak
matches.ayah_ar: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ

history.comfort: Rest is not weakness — even our Prophet ﷺ rested. Be gentle with yourself today. Allah sees your effort even when you feel you have nothing left. 🤍

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: Believers, take care of your own souls. The misguided cannot harm you as long as you are guided. All of you will return to God. Then He will make you realize that which you used to do.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ لَا يَضُرُّكُم مَّن ضَلَّ إِذَا ٱهْتَدَيْتُمْ ۚ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

matches.ayah: And if they would betray you, they betrayed God before, and He gave \[you\] power over them. God is aware and wise.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِن يُرِيدُوا۟ خِيَانَتَكَ فَقَدْ خَانُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مِن قَبْلُ فَأَمْكَنَ مِنْهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ

matches.ayah: if you have suffered a wound, they too have suffered a similar wound. We bring these days to men by turns, so that God may know those who believe, and choose witnesses from among you; and God does not love the unjust,
matches.ayah_ar: إِن يَمْسَسْكُمْ قَرْحٌۭ فَقَدْ مَسَّ ٱلْقَوْمَ قَرْحٌۭ مِّثْلُهُۥ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَيَّامُ نُدَاوِلُهَا بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَيَتَّخِذَ مِنكُمْ شُهَدَآءَ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: I feel hopeful today I really believe things are going to get better inshallah making dua and trusting Allah

matches.ayah: there is good news in this life and in the Hereafter: the Word of God shall never change. That is the supreme triumph.
matches.ayah_ar: لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِكَلِمَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

matches.ayah: So be patient, for what God has promised is sure to come. Ask forgiveness for your sins; praise your Lord morning and evening.
matches.ayah_ar: فَٱصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِبْكَٰرِ

matches.ayah: We hope our Lord will forgive us, as we are the first of the believers."
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

history.comfort: That hope you feel? Hold onto it — it is a gift from Allah. He who gave you the hope will give you the thing you hope for, in His perfect time. 💛

history.entry: I don't know which direction to take in life I feel so lost and unclear about everything what to do

matches.ayah: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you \[Prophet\] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,
matches.ayah_ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ رُوحًۭا مِّنْ أَمْرِنَا ۚ مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى مَا ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَلَا ٱلْإِيمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِن جَعَلْنَٰهُ نُورًۭا نَّهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن نَّشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۚ وَإِنَّكَ لَتَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ

matches.ayah: Then We set you on a clear path \[of religion\]: so follow it, and do not yield to the desires of those who have no knowledge.
matches.ayah_ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

matches.ayah: Father, I have been given some knowledge which has not come to you, so follow me: I shall guide you along a straight path.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًۭا سَوِيًّۭا

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel calm and at peace today my heart feels settled and I'm just grateful for everything around me

matches.ayah: those who believe and whose hearts find comfort in the remembrance of God -- surely in the remembrance of God hearts can find comfort.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ قُلُوبُهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ أَلَا بِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ ٱلْقُلُوبُ

matches.ayah: whose hearts are filled with awe at the mention of God; who endure adversity with fortitude, say their prayers regularly and spend out of what We have given them.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ عَلَىٰ مَآ أَصَابَهُمْ وَٱلْمُقِيمِى ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ

matches.ayah: There is truly a reminder in this for whoever has a heart, whoever listens attentively.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Alhamdulillah for this peace. It is a sign that your heart is close to Allah. Protect this feeling through dhikr and gratitude. 🌿

history.entry: Today was a day. I just sat there. Things happened. I don't know.

matches.ayah: The believer said, "My people, follow me! I will guide you to the right path.
matches.ayah_ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَامَنَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ ٱلرَّشَادِ

matches.ayah: Men, you have received clear evidence from your Lord. We have sent down a clear light to you.
matches.ayah_ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ قَدْ جَآءَكُم بُرْهَٰنٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَأَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ نُورًۭا مُّبِينًۭا

matches.ayah: Your Lord knows best who has strayed from His Way and He knows best those who are guided.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ مَن يَضِلُّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۖ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

history.comfort: Not knowing which way to go is the perfect time to turn to Allah. Pray Istikhara, make dua, trust that He will make the right path clear. 🌙

history.entry: I feel sad and lost today

matches.ayah: When the Quran is read, listen to it with attention, and hold your peace, so that you may receive mercy.
matches.ayah_ar: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ فَٱسْتَمِعُوا۟ لَهُۥ وَأَنصِتُوا۟ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I feel anxious and stressed about everything in my life right now

matches.ayah: As for those who left their homes for the cause of God and then were slain or died, God will give them a generous provision. Surely God is the Best of Providers.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هَاجَرُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ قُتِلُوٓا۟ أَوْ مَاتُوا۟ لَيَرْزُقَنَّهُمُ ٱللَّهُ رِزْقًا حَسَنًۭا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ

matches.ayah: He who submits himself completely to God, and is a doer of good, has surely grasped a strong handle, for the final outcome of all events rests with God.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ وَمَن يُسْلِمْ وَجْهَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌۭ فَقَدِ ٱسْتَمْسَكَ بِٱلْعُرْوَةِ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ ۗ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: Our provision for you will never be exhausted.
matches.ayah_ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ

matches.ayah: Stay well away from an orphan's property, except with the best intentions, before he comes of age. Give full measure and weight, according to justice, We never charge a soul with more than it can bear, when you speak, observe justice, even though it concerns a close relative; and fulfil the covenants of God. That is what He has enjoined upon you so that you may take heed.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا۟ مَالَ ٱلْيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِى هِىَ أَحْسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبْلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ ۖ وَأَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَإِذَا قُلْتُمْ فَٱعْدِلُوا۟ وَلَوْ كَانَ ذَا قُرْبَىٰ ۖ وَبِعَهْدِ ٱللَّهِ أَوْفُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

matches.ayah: We never sent any messengers before you who did not eat food and walk in the market-place. We make some of you a means of trial for others, to see whether you are steadfast. Your Lord is all seeing.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍۢ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًۭا

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: My heart is broken I was betrayed by someone I trusted completely I can't forgive and can't let go

matches.ayah: it is He who gave you life. Then He will cause you to die. Then He will give you life again. Surely, man is most ungrateful.
matches.ayah_ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحْيَاكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَكَفُورٌۭ

matches.ayah: When two groups from among you were about to lose heart, God was their protector. In God let the faithful put their trust.
matches.ayah_ar: إِذْ هَمَّت طَّآئِفَتَانِ مِنكُمْ أَن تَفْشَلَا وَٱللَّهُ وَلِيُّهُمَا ۗ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

matches.ayah: It may well be that God will create goodwill between you and those of them with whom you are now at enmity -- for God is all powerful, most forgiving and merciful.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةًۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

history.comfort: A broken heart is still a heart that loved, and love is never wasted in Allah's eyes. He is the only one who can truly mend what is broken. 🌙

history.entry: not feeling good

matches.ayah: These are tidings of the unseen that We reveal to you, \[O Prophet\], which you did not know before, nor did your people, so be patient: the future belongs to the God-fearing.
matches.ayah_ar: تِلْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ ٱلْغَيْبِ نُوحِيهَآ إِلَيْكَ ۖ مَا كُنتَ تَعْلَمُهَآ أَنتَ وَلَا قَوْمُكَ مِن قَبْلِ هَٰذَا ۖ فَٱصْبِرْ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلْعَٰقِبَةَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ

matches.ayah: Believe then in God and His Messenger, and in the light which We have sent down. God is fully aware of all that you do.
matches.ayah_ar: فَـَٔامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَٱلنُّورِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلْنَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ

matches.ayah: This is a blessed Book which We sent down to you \[Muhammad\], for people to ponder over its messages, and for those with understanding to take heed.
matches.ayah_ar: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَٰرَكٌۭ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ

history.comfort: These quiet moments of reflection are rare and precious. Allah loves the heart that pauses and thinks. Whatever you're working through, clarity will come. 🌙

history.entry: I have been crying all day and feel so empty inside like nothing matters anymore

matches.ayah: We do indeed know how your heart is distressed at what they say.
matches.ayah_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ

matches.ayah: We have sent you forth as a mercy to all mankind.
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

matches.ayah: Take alms out of their wealth to cleanse them and purify them, and pray for them; your prayer will be a comfort to them. God is all hearing, all knowing.
matches.ayah_ar: خُذْ مِنْ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ صَدَقَةًۭ تُطَهِّرُهُمْ وَتُزَكِّيهِم بِهَا وَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّ صَلَوٰتَكَ سَكَنٌۭ لَّهُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ

history.comfort: It's okay to feel sad. Even the Prophets wept. Allah does not waste your tears — every one of them is seen and counted. After hardship always comes ease. 💛

history.entry: I'm so stressed about my exams I haven't slept properly in days and I feel like I'm going to fail everything

matches.ayah: You will surely be tried and tested in your possessions and your persons, and you shall surely hear many hurtful things from those who were given the Book before you and from those who set up partners with God, but if you endure with fortitude and restrain yourselves, that indeed is a matter of strong determination.
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ لَتُبْلَوُنَّ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ وَلَتَسْمَعُنَّ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوٓا۟ أَذًۭى كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَإِن تَصْبِرُوا۟ وَتَتَّقُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ

matches.ayah: God! There is no deity save Him, the Living, the Sustainer.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْحَىُّ ٱلْقَيُّومُ

matches.ayah: God does not disdain to give a parable about a gnat or a smaller creature. The faithful know that it is the truth from their Lord, but those who deny the truth ask, "What could God mean by this parable?" He lets many go astray through it, and guides many by it. But He makes only the disobedient go astray:
matches.ayah_ar: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًۭا مَّا بَعُوضَةًۭ فَمَا فَوْقَهَا ۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًۭا ۘ يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ

history.comfort: When everything feels too much, remember: Allah is closer to you than your own heartbeat. You don't have to solve it all today. Just take the next small step. 🌿

history.entry: Alhamdulillah I just got news that made me realize how blessed I truly am so much gratitude in my heart

matches.ayah: Whatever blessing you have is from God, and to Him you turn for help when distress befalls you,
matches.ayah_ar: وَمَا بِكُم مِّن نِّعْمَةٍۢ فَمِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِذَا مَسَّكُمُ ٱلضُّرُّ فَإِلَيْهِ تَجْـَٔرُونَ

matches.ayah: Therefore, you should worship God alone and be among the thankful.
matches.ayah_ar: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ

matches.ayah: It is God who has given you the night in which to rest and the day in which to see. God is truly bountiful to people, but most people do not give thanks.
matches.ayah_ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِتَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

history.comfort: MashaAllah — that quiet feeling of noticing your blessings is itself a gift from Allah. Keep returning to gratitude; it opens more doors than you know. 🤍

history.entry: I feel completely alone nobody checks on me nobody sees me I'm invisible to everyone around me

matches.ayah: God knows all that you conceal and all that you reveal.
matches.ayah_ar: وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ

matches.ayah: your Lord has not forsaken you, nor is He displeased with you,
matches.ayah_ar: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ

matches.ayah: You were heedless of this, but now We have removed your veil, so your sight today is sharp.
matches.ayah_ar: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ

history.comfort: Allah is with you even when no one else is — He hears you before you even speak. You are never truly alone. 🤍

history.entry: I'm so angry it's not fair I've been treated with such injustice and I can't let it go

matches.ayah: My people, seek forgiveness of your Lord and turn to Him in repentance. He will send from the sky abundant rain upon you; He will add strength to your strength. Do not turn away from Him as evil-doers."
